visions.wristbands: none in the vision; later transition to vacant cuffs at the pier
visions.style: Aida’s POV fills the entire frame with the later pier moment; the glowing orb edge and soft rose-pink haze sit only at the margins, with no sanctuary visible around it.
visions.materialize: Rose-quartz light coalesces out of soft darkness into the pier image, then dissolves back into Aida’s morning cove.

recurring.name: Squeaky
recurring.appearance: Small dolphin from locked reference, no speech, no power crystal.
recurring.orientation: First appears beside Keen’s boat in Scene 3, then keeps pace screen-right of the boat through open water; returns from sea to shore in Scene 8.

recurring.name: Keen's Mum
recurring.appearance: Adult female bear, same size class as Aida, with locked natural look and maternal softness from reference.
recurring.orientation: Anchored on the pier as the home-side figure; Keen sails away from her toward open water.

recurring.name: Keen's cuffs
recurring.appearance: Gold father’s cuffs: vacant with empty dark kite-shaped recess in Scenes 3–8; crystal-set with faceted aquamarine gems from Scene 9 onward.
recurring.orientation: Placed on Keen’s wrists during Scene 3; never regress once worn, and never become crystal-set before Scene 9.

persistent.in: On Keen after his Mum gives them to him; they remain vacant through the storm and underwater rescue.
On Keen from the aquamarine award onward.
Keen’s performance and the aqua self-glow underwater, carried into the homecoming.

lost.name: Keen's map
lost.reason: The storm wind snatches it from his paws and it vanishes into the rain, making Keen physically and emotionally lost.

lost.name: Keen's boat
lost.reason: After Keen dives into the storm sea and the rescue escalates, the boat is gone when he returns toward shore on Squeaky.

lost.name: Drift net
lost.reason: Keen tears it apart to free Squeaky; it should not reappear intact after the SNAP.

items.name: Keen's map
items.appearance: Rolled travel map loaded at the pier, later unfolded on the boat before being lost to storm wind.

items.name: Keen's satchel
items.appearance: Travel satchel checked repeatedly by Keen, carrying his need to look prepared.

items.name: Berry pouch
items.appearance: Small travel supply loaded with the final boat supplies at the pier.

items.name: Blanket
items.appearance: Rolled travel blanket loaded into the little sailboat.

items.name: Small sailboat
items.appearance: Neat little sailboat at the dock, then vulnerable alone on open water before being lost in the storm.

items.name: Crystal bowl and wand
items.appearance: Aida’s sanctuary bowl and wand producing the low shimmering tone that opens the vision.

items.name: Keen's cuffs, vacant state
items.appearance: Gold cuffs with empty dark kite-shaped recesses, worn from the pier through the rescue.

items.name: Keen's cuffs, crystal-set state
items.appearance: Gold cuffs with aquamarine gems settled into the kite-shaped bezels, active from the award onward.

items.name: Ragged drift net
items.appearance: Torn, rough sea net wrapped tightly around Squeaky’s tail underwater until Keen tears it free.

items.name: Aquamarine crystal
items.appearance: Glowing aquamarine light that forms between Aida and Keen, splits into two gems and settles into the cuffs.

worldState.change: Warm playful meadow shifts subtly as distant thunder enters; storm pressure begins in the world before the bees understand it.
Aida receives the rose-quartz vision of Keen at the pier; the cove’s quiet becomes purposeful.
Keen leaves home, receives the vacant cuffs and sails away; Mum remains behind as the emotional home anchor.
Open blue water becomes storm field; map is lost and Keen becomes disoriented.
Fuzzby and Zenny spot the tiny boat in trouble, converting comic motion into an alarm path toward Crystal Cove.
Storm reaches the cove; the Crystal Bears create a rescue beacon across the sea.
Squeaky is trapped, Keen dives, the net tears, the boat is lost, and the vacant cuffs first glow from within.
The storm begins to break as Keen and Squeaky reach the shallows; Squeaky carries Aida’s message home.
Post-storm light settles; aquamarine gems enter Keen’s cuffs and Keen becomes part of the Crystal Bears family.
The beach returns to calm golden-hour belonging, with wet traces of the storm still sparkling rather than erased.
